title: First Species Above an A-minor Cantus (cold-model task)
objective: Complete a first-species counterpoint above the given A-minor cantus, one note against one.
prompt: Replace rests in V0 with one whole-beat note per row. Keep V1 unchanged. Every interval must be consonant; no parallel perfect intervals. Minor mode: raise the leading tone (G#) only at the penultimate beat; avoid outlining an augmented second (F to G#).
success_criteria: All intervals consonant, no parallel perfects.
G# only at the penultimate beat.
